summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of InteriorAR newsletter landing page. All UI components, animations, forms, and interactions working perfectly. Premium editorial design with dark theme, orange accents, and GLITCH cat mascot implemented successfully.
passed_tests: Fixed navigation with logo and links (Temas, Newsletter, Suscribirse)
Animated ticker with rotating messages at top
Hero section with main title 'ESTÁS SIENDO DISEÑADO' and email form
Email form submissions showing 'Enviado' state (mocked functionality)
GDPR checkbox functionality in both forms
Origin section with GLITCH cat and mechanism explanation
Territories section with neuroscience topics table
Final section with highlighted subscription form
Cookie banner with Configurar/Aceptar buttons and proper dismissal
Navigation links scrolling to correct sections
Scroll animations and glitch effects on cat images
Instrument Serif typography and premium editorial design

success_percentage.backend: N/A - Static landing page with mocked form submissions
